view.title: Validate persona scenario #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of running a consolidated report for multiple clients, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this specific functionality is implemented or behaves as expected. While the linked use case outlines the membership features, it lacks concrete evidence or prior steps that demonstrate the successful execution of the report generation or its outcomes. Therefore, without clear evidence supporting the expected result, the validation remains inconclusive.
